results.title: Super Retail-Owned XTM Camping Fridges Recalled Over Fire Risk
results.description: Super Retail Group has recalled four XTM portable fridge freezers sold nationally through BCF and Supercheap Auto after regulators found the products failed mandatory Australian and New Zealand flammability requirements. The ACCC warned the TTF camping fridge range poses a risk of serious injury, death or property damage if it catches fire. Consumers have been [...]
